# Omaya

> Omaya, also known as Omaya Care, is a Ghana-focused postpartum care and maternal health follow-up service. It checks in with mothers by phone call and SMS after hospital discharge and escalates concerning cases to the hospital's clinical team.

## Search identity

- Public brand: Omaya
- Alternate name: Omaya Care
- Website: https://omayacare.com
- Country focus: Ghana
- Core topics: postpartum care Ghana, maternal health Ghana, postnatal care Ghana, hospital discharge follow-up, maternal continuity of care, SMS health check-ins, clinical escalation

## What Omaya does

- Enroll at discharge: a nurse adds the mother, delivery notes, language, and next check-in before she leaves.
- Check in by call and SMS: Omaya asks about pain, bleeding, mood, sleep, feeding, medication, and warning signs.
- Escalate the few who need care: stable updates are logged; concerning answers go to the clinical team with context.

## Who it is for

- Hospitals and maternity teams: a triaged queue instead of a manual follow-up call list, with an audit trail per mother.
- Mothers: simple check-ins, reminders, and a clear path back to care when recovery does not feel right.

## Key facts

- No app and no smartphone required — works over phone calls and SMS on any phone.
- Human-led: the hospital's clinical team stays in control of care decisions.
- After-discharge follow-up extends up to one year postpartum.
- Currently running focused pilots with maternity teams in Ghana.
- Omaya supports follow-up and escalation. It does not replace urgent care, qualified clinical judgment, or professional medical advice.

## Important pages

- Homepage: https://omayacare.com
- Postpartum care in Ghana: https://omayacare.com/postpartum-care-ghana
- Maternal health in Ghana: https://omayacare.com/maternal-health-ghana

- For mothers: https://omayacare.com/for-mothers
- About Omaya: https://omayacare.com/about
- Sitemap: https://omayacare.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://omayacare.com/robots.txt

## Start a pilot

A pilot maps your discharge workflow, enrolls a first cohort of mothers, then reviews alerts, response time, and patient feedback.

## Offsite SEO checklist

- Verify Google Search Console and submit https://omayacare.com/sitemap.xml.
- Request indexing for the homepage and all important pages.
- Create or optimize a Google Business Profile as Omaya if eligible.
- Keep name, phone, website, country focus, and service description consistent across citations.
- Add credible entity links from MEST/Bloom, LinkedIn, founder profiles, pilot or partner mentions, startup directories, and relevant Ghana health innovation listings.
- Track search visibility for: omaya, omaya care, postpartum care ghana, postpartum ghana, maternal health ghana, postnatal care ghana.
